# Mission: Property Intelligence Layer

## Problem
The team needs a document intelligence layer that can ingest property notes, classify them, and produce mock LLM summaries in CI.

## Technical Hints
- LLM_PROVIDER=mock by default
- Document ingestion
- Classification and summary

## Deliverables
- Intelligence service skeleton
- Mock LLM classifier
- Handover docs

## Constraints
- No live LLM calls in CI
- Human review required
